_README: Local overrides for make_config.py. Copy this file, fill it in, and pass it
with --overrides. Every value here REPLACES the value the extractor derived
(deep_merge with overrides winning; lists are replaced wholesale).
Put document-specific or non-English content here, NOT in make_config.py.
Keys whose name starts with '_' (like this one and '_comment') are stripped
and never reach the produced config -- use them for notes only.
_comment_id: Short slug; must match the project.json 'template' field used at render time.
_comment_fixed_body_sections: 1-based [chapter, sub-section] pairs whose body paragraphs are captured verbatim as reusable fixed bodies (sec_<chap>_<sub>).
_comment_skeleton_marks: compliance_chapter = 1-based index of the top-level chapter that should carry the data-table mark (its children are dropped).

cover._comment_fields: GUI field schema list (application schema, not document text).

compliance._comment: Data-table styling/judgment block. Defaults below match the renderer.

default_limit.le: flag values above the upper bound
default_limit.range: flag values outside the spec range

ui_strings._comment: UI labels for the editor application. Replace with your locale.
